name: loop-in-mcp
description: Async human-in-the-loop input via shareable links — Claude asks people outside your coding session for input, you keep working.

loop_base_url.description: Loop backend base URL (use http://localhost:3002 for local dev, https://loop.app for production)

loop_token.description: Loop API token (run /loop-connect to get one if you don't have it yet)
